arabic:
وعنها أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم كان يقول في ركوعه وسجوده‏:‏ ‏
"‏سبوح قدوس رب الملائكة والروح‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: 'Aishah (May Allah be pleased with her) reported:
english.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) used to recite in his bowing and prostration: "Subbuhun Quddusun, Rabbul-mala'ikati war-ruh .

chapter.english: The Book of the Remembrance of Allah
